mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT rownum rn, t.* FROM ( select h.hotelno, (select hotelFileName from hotel_image where hotelNo = h.hotelNo and rownum = 1) as hotelFileName, NVL(rh.realhotelname, h.hotelName) as realhotelname, NVL(a.ag, 0) as ag, NVL(rh.roadaddr, h.address) as roadaddr, h.mainAddress from hotel h left join realhotel rh on h.realhotelno = rh.realhotelno left join ( select hotelno, round(avg(grade),1) as ag from review group by hotelno ) a on a.hotelno = h.hotelno order by a.ag desc nulls last, h.hotelRegistDate desc ) t WHERE rownum <= #{pageNum} * #{amount} ) WHERE rn > (#{pageNum} - 1) * #{amount}

select t.* from ( select r.reviewno, h.hotelno, NVL(rh.realhotelname, h.hotelName) as realhotelname, r.reviewdate, r.reviewcontent from hotel h left join realhotel rh on h.realhotelno = rh.realhotelno inner join review r on r.hotelno = h.hotelno order by r.reviewno desc ) t where rownum < 5
select n.hotelNo, i.hotelFileName, n.hotelName, n.mainAddress, n.address from hotel_image i, hotel n where i.hotelNo = n.hotelNo

select h.hotelno, COALESCE(rh.realhotelname, h.hotelName) as realhotelName, COALESCE(h.hotelFileName, (select min(hi.hotelFileName) from hotel_image hi where hi.hotelNo = h.hotelNo) ) as hotelFileName, COALESCE(rh.state, h.mainAddress) as state, (select min(hr.roomPrice) from hotel_room hr where hr.hotelNo = h.hotelNo) as roomPrice, NVL(a.ag, 0) as ag, h.buffet, h.swim, h.golf, h.pet, h.restaurant, h.fitness, h.parking, h.wifi, h.kitchen, h.smoke from hotel h left join realhotel rh on h.realhotelno = rh.realhotelno left join ( select hotelno, round(avg(grade),1) as ag from review group by hotelno ) a on a.hotelno = h.hotelno
AND ( rh.state LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR h.mainAddress LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR h.hotelName LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' )
order by h.hotelRegistDate desc

select count(*) from hotel where hotelNo > 0
and title like '%'||#{keyword}||'%'

select rh.state as "state", count(*) as "cnt" from reservation res join hotel_room hr on res.roomNo = hr.roomNo join hotel h on hr.hotelNo = h.hotelNo join realhotel rh on h.realhotelNo = rh.realhotelNo where rh.state is not null group by rh.state order by count(*) desc fetch first #{limit} rows only
select rh.state as "state", count(*) as "cnt" from realhotel rh where rh.state is not null group by rh.state order by count(*) desc fetch first #{limit} rows only
